results.title: Tame Impala: Sound Check at Cherry Lane Theatre
results.original_title: Tame Impala: Sound Check at Cherry Lane Theatre
results.overview: Tame Impala stops by Cherry Lane Theatre for Sound Check.

results.title: Eternity
results.overview: In an afterlife where souls have one week to decide where to spend eternity, Joan is faced with the impossible choice between the man she spent her life with and her first love, who died young and has waited decades for her to arrive.

results.title: Marty Supreme
results.overview: Marty Mauser, a young man with a dream no one respects, goes to hell and back in pursuit of greatness.

results.title: Nuisance Bear
results.overview: A polar bear is forced to navigate a human world of tourists, wildlife officers, and hunters as its ancient migration collides with modern life. When a sacred predator is branded a nuisance, it becomes unclear who truly belongs in this shared landscape.

results.title: The Moment
results.overview: A rising pop sensation navigates fame and industry pressures while preparing for her arena tour debut, revealing the transformation of underground culture into mainstream success.

results.title: André Is an Idiot
results.overview: André, a brilliant idiot, is dying because he didn’t get a colonoscopy. His sobering diagnosis, complete irreverence, and insatiable curiosity, send him on an unexpected journey learning how to die happily and ridiculously without losing his sense of humor.

results.title: Marc by Sofia
results.overview: An intimate, unconventional portrait of Marc Jacobs, crafted by Sofia Coppola to capture the genius and singular universe of the iconic American designer.

results.title: The Drama
results.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

results.title: Mother Mary
results.overview: Long-buried wounds rise to the surface when iconic pop star Mother Mary reunites with her estranged best friend and former costume designer Sam Anselm on the eve of her comeback performance.

results.title: Backrooms
results.overview: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.

results.title: Tony
results.overview: A 19-year-old Anthony Bourdain travels to Provincetown and stumbles into the chaotic world of a restaurant kitchen, setting off a summer that will shape the course of his life.

results.title: Onslaught
results.overview: When a rogue squad of genetically engineered super soldiers break loose in the desert, a badass Army sniper must unleash hell to protect her young daughter.

results.title: Primetime
results.overview: In 2006, To Catch a Predator host Chris Hansen sets out to make television history.

results.title: Elden Ring
results.overview: A live-action adaptation of the dark fantasy video game, set in the war-torn world of the Lands Between, which was once united by the Elden Ring. Plot details TBA.

results.title: Oltreoceano
results.overview: At twenty-nine, acclaimed screenwriter Natasha Bergman is one step away from the life she's spent years writing for when her mother's death forces her back home. The only chapter she never imagined she'd have to write.

results.title: Untitled New York Knicks Documentary
results.overview: A multi-part documentary about the storied NBA team the New York Knicks, who broke their 53 year championship drought with their iconic 2026 win.  Unprecedented NBA access, never-before-seen footage, and a definitive look at one of basketball’s most iconic stories.

results.title: Scapegoat
results.overview: After a social media media influencer dies during surgery, the surgeon faces intense public scrutiny at the hands of the influencer's brother and widow.

results.title: Untitled Undertone Prequel
results.overview: Plot TBA. Centers around the couple from the haunted audio recordings.

results.title: Not Another F*cking Wedding
results.overview: When Bobbi's best friend Jess breaks their no-wedding pact by announcing her engagement, Bobbi is thrust into a whirlwind romance of her own amid the wedding chaos.

results.title: Notes from a Young Black Chef
results.original_title: Notes from a Young Black Chef
results.overview: Based on Kwame Onwuachi's memoir which tells his unprecedented journey from childhood in the Bronx with a mostly single mother to opening a fine-dining restaurant in Washington D.C. at the age of 26.
